projects.name: Creative Agency Website
projects.shortDesc: A fully interactive, motion-heavy website designed for a modern creative agency.
projects.longDesc: This project is a high-performance web experience focused on animations, smooth micro-interactions, and premium layouts. Built with Vite and Framer Motion for optimal rendering.
projects.challenge: Designing a site with heavy animations and WebGL assets while maintaining a Google Lighthouse score above 90.
projects.solution: Utilized lazy-loading of components, texture optimization in WebGL layers, and hardware-accelerated CSS animations.
projects.results: Achieved a performance score of 98 on desktop and improved page loading times by 40% across all devices.

projects.name: Premium FinTech App
projects.shortDesc: An intuitive dashboard and transaction tracker layout for managing luxury finance assets.
projects.longDesc: A product design study focused on clarity, security guidelines, and elegant charts for asset allocation. Complete design system developed from scratch.
projects.challenge: Presenting complicated investment analytics and balance metrics on standard mobile screens without clutter.
projects.solution: Designed progressive disclosure cards, clean sliding panel drawers, and curated HSL-tailored charts.
projects.results: User testing reported a 28% increase in task completion speed for transferring currency and reviewing transactions.

projects.name: Minimal E-Commerce Experience
projects.shortDesc: A clean, typography-focused storefront interface for premium wooden furniture catalog.
projects.longDesc: High-fidelity UI study and front-end template with fluid grids and responsive details designed for premium e-commerce.
projects.challenge: Translating physical texture and premium feel of handcrafted furniture products onto standard flat screens.
projects.solution: High-resolution image grids, minimal text overlays, and slow-zoom scroll animations mimicking real gallery frames.
projects.results: Tested and proven to increase conversion engagement metrics during user studies.

projects.name: AI SaaS Dashboard
projects.shortDesc: A sleek analytics interface layout for tracking cloud compute and LLM agent iterations.
projects.longDesc: Full stack dashboard template design incorporating real-time telemetry datasets and modular widgets.
projects.challenge: Updating multi-threaded dataset feeds instantly on client views without thread locks or browser memory leaks.
projects.solution: Implemented WebSocket push channels, worker thread memoization, and virtualized table rows.
projects.results: Reduced rendering latency by 65% and delivered 60fps telemetry graph updates.
